title: "Initial theme release"
description: "First cut of the doc-template docs theme."

tags: ["theme", "release"]

---

The first release of the theme:

- Dark-first design with an amber accent and terminal hero.
- `callout`, `tooltip` and `icon` shortcodes.
- Sidebar, on-this-page TOC, and a weight-ordered pager.
